name: @prodivix/golden-conformance
description: Living Golden App conformance gate for the Prodivix change and export kernels

scripts.test:g2-auth-server-matrix: pnpm exec tsc -b ../workspace ../prodivix-compiler --pretty false && pnpm run typecheck && vitest --config vitest.config.ts --run src/goldenG2AuthServerMatrix.conformance.test.ts
scripts.test:g2-data-target-matrix: pnpm exec tsc -b ../workspace ../prodivix-compiler --pretty false && pnpm run typecheck && vitest --config vitest.config.ts --run src/goldenG2DataTargetMatrix.conformance.test.ts src/goldenG2VueTarget.conformance.test.ts
scripts.test:g2-data-security-matrix: pnpm exec tsc -b ../workspace ../prodivix-compiler --pretty false && pnpm run typecheck && vitest --config vitest.config.ts --run src/goldenG2DataSecurityMatrix.conformance.test.ts
scripts.test:g2-vue-target: pnpm run test:g2-data-target-matrix && cross-env PRODIVIX_VERIFY_G2_VUE_TARGET=1 vitest --config vitest.config.ts --run src/goldenG2VueTarget.browser.test.ts
scripts.test:g2-vue-product: pnpm exec tsc -b ../workspace ../prodivix-compiler --pretty false && pnpm run typecheck && vitest --config vitest.config.ts --run src/goldenG2VueCatalog.conformance.test.ts && cross-env PRODIVIX_VERIFY_G2_VUE_PRODUCT=1 vitest --config vitest.config.ts --run src/goldenG2VueCatalog.browser.test.ts src/goldenG2VueCatalogRemote.browser.test.ts
